summary: Regional Agency Portal system testing complete. All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Agency CRUD, agency user management, agency portal login, availability search, reservation creation, and content distribution all functional.
features_tested: POST /api/agency-portal/auth/login - Agency login (invalid credentials rejected) - PASSED
POST /api/agency-portal/auth/login - Hotel user rejected from agency portal - PASSED
POST /api/agency-portal/auth/login - Valid agency user login - PASSED
POST /api/agency-portal/reservations - Create reservation (auto-drops to PMS) - PASSED
GET /api/agency-reservations - Hotel admin view agency reservations - PASSED
Frontend: Agency Management page loads at /agency-management - PASSED
Frontend: Agency list displays with status, commission, contact info - PASSED
Frontend: Agency Portal login page at /agency-portal - PASSED
Frontend: Agency Portal login flow (ayse@antalyaturizm.com / acente123) - PASSED
Frontend: Agency Portal dashboard with tabs (Musaitlik Ara, Rezervasyonlarim, Otel Bilgileri) - PASSED
Frontend: Availability search returns 6 room types with prices and amenities - PASSED
Frontend: Reservation creation via modal dialog - PASSED
Frontend: Reservation confirmation with AGN- prefix code - PASSED
Frontend: Reservations tab shows agency bookings with status - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: agency_portal.py: Well-structured with clear separation between hotel admin endpoints (/api/agencies/*) and agency portal endpoints (/api/agency-portal/*)
agency_portal.py: Proper role-based access control using _require_hotel_staff() and _require_agency_user() helpers
agency_portal.py: Agency reservations auto-create PMS bookings with source_channel='agency' and agency_name field for tracking
agency_portal.py: Commission tracking implemented with agency_commission_rate and agency_commission_amount fields
agency_content.py: Content distribution properly marks agencies with published_content=True flag
AgencyPortalDashboard.jsx: Separate JWT storage (agency_token) for agency users, independent from hotel auth
AgencyManagement.jsx: Proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
routeDefinitions.jsx: Agency portal correctly configured as public route at /agency-portal
seed_data_creation: Test agencies created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agency Portal system fully functional. Agency users login at /agency-portal (public route) with separate JWT. Hotel admins manage agencies at /agency-management (protected route). Agency reservations auto-drop to PMS with source_channel='agency'. Content distribution marks agencies with published_content flag. Test agency user: ayse@antalyaturizm.com / acente123

frontend_tests.agency_management_page: WORKING - Shows 7 agencies with status, commission, contact info
frontend_tests.agency_portal_login: WORKING - Login form with email/password, successful login redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.agency_portal_dashboard: WORKING - Three tabs: Musaitlik Ara, Rezervasyonlarim, Otel Bilgileri
frontend_tests.availability_search: WORKING - Returns 6 room types with prices, capacity, amenities
frontend_tests.reservation_creation: WORKING - Modal dialog, creates booking with AGN- confirmation code
frontend_tests.reservations_list: WORKING - Shows agency bookings with status (Onaylandi)
